title: selago canescens
intro: Selago canescens, also known as the Silver-leaved Cudweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Selago canescens include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
